name: compute_wacc
description: Computes the Weighted Average Cost of Capital for a property. WACC = (E/V × Re) + (D/V × Rd × (1-T)). Used as the discount rate for DCF property valuation.

debt.description: Total debt outstanding ($). Can be 0 for all-cash.

cost_of_equity.description: Required equity return as decimal (e.g. 0.18 = 18%). User-provided, not CAPM-derived.

tax_rate.description: Corporate tax rate as decimal (e.g. 0.25 = 25%). For interest tax shield.
